images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol/influencer model, early 20s, with flawless yet realistic skin showing fine pores and a natural glow, large expressive almond eyes, a cute yet seductive face, and straight silky black hair falling over exposed collarbones. She wears an oversized boyfriend shirt—soft ivory cotton, sheer lace trim, unbuttoned at the neck to reveal a glimpse of a skin‑toned camisole and the gentle curve of her ample chest—paired with high‑waisted denim shorts that hug her slim waist and flare over toned thighs. She stands inside a vintage telephone booth bathed in bright disco‑ball reflections, pastel‑pink and mint‑green panels glittering with global illumination; a shallow depth of field blurs the surrounding café patrons while spotlighting her shy smile as she glances down, lips slightly parted. Lighting: a soft, even glow from the mirrored ball, no harsh shadows; pastel, airy color grade; shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced highlights, cinematic bokeh, ultra‑detailed texture.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a 20‑year‑old Japanese idol‑style model, fresh from the shower, standing before a full‑length mirror in a bright, softly lit walk‑in closet. Her wet black hair clings to her neck, sleek and straight. She wears a tight, high‑neck cashmere‑blend turtleneck that molds to her hourglass figure, the sheen highlighting her collarbones, slender waist and full bust. Eye‑level framing captures her subtle lower‑lip bite, a light smile, and the glance that meets the camera as if to a fan. Ambient morning‑mist diffuse light bathes her in gentle glow while the background—cream walls, gold‑tinted clothing rails—is blurred into creamy bokeh. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray‑traced global illumination, cinematic grain for a dreamy, film‑like finish.8k photo, Large breasts

Raw, ultra‑realistic 8K photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model: flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores, soft vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, straight black silky hair, and a fit, curvy silhouette (slim waist, ample bust). She wears a form‑fitting Japanese school‑swimsuit (死庫水), the matte navy‑blue fabric hugging every curve and white trim accentuating the look. The scene unfolds in an upscale art‑gallery, the background blurred by creamy bokeh, bathed in bright, diffused morning‑mist light for a clean, high‑key ambience, while a subtle monochrome‑red grade adds a dark, moody tonality. Shot at eye‑level with a Sony A7R IV using an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, the shallow depth of field isolates her intense, direct gaze. She holds an elegant yoga‑pose as a professional instructor, the image enriched by soft global illumination and subtle ray‑traced reflections, creating a viral‑Instagram aesthetic.8k photo, Large breasts
